title: The Davy Back Fight Challenge
description: Zoro and Sanji enter a brutal team match where cooperation matters as much as strength.
scene: Across pages 0, 1, 2, 3, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro. Zoro and Sanji enter a brutal team match where cooperation matters as much as strength.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We probably shouldn't just blindly charge in...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What exciting things will happen next!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yo, boy. Want something to eat!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Hehe. Is this a little awkward?

dialogue.speaker: Porche
dialogue.text: She is entering the long coral area........

summary: Zoro and Sanji enter a brutal team match where cooperation matters as much as strength.
